Mechanical Engineer & CAD Designer

Adibul Ajraf Abith

I'm a fast learner who loves picking up new things. What draws me to CAD is the ability to create anything — starting from a completely blank page.

Download CV
About Myself

I'm currently a 2nd year BSc Student at Khulna University of Engineering and Technology (KUET) specializing in CAD & 3D Mechanical Design. I have a natural drive to design build and create innovative solutions .I enjoy shifting from conceptual thoughts to a fully realized, optimized 3D design. Being an adaptive, swift learner, I continuously advanced to more complex workflows and love pushing technical constraints.
